# CWE-182 positive: filtering collapses input into privileged value (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-182-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"encoding/json"
	"net/http"
	"regexp"
	"strings"
)

var stripSymbols = regexp.MustCompile(`[^a-zA-Z0-9]+`)

// CWE-182 Collapse of Data into Unsafe Value
// Vulnerable line: stripping symbols turns "--editor--" into "editor".
func GrantCapability(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request, caps map[string]bool) {
	capability := r.FormValue("capability")
	capability = stripSymbols.ReplaceAllString(capability, "")
	capability = strings.ToLower(capability)
	if !caps[capability] {
		http.Error(w, "denied", http.StatusForbidden)
		return
	}
	w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
	_ = json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(map[string]string{"capability": capability})
}
